description:
2023 Dodge Charger SRT Hellcat Redeye, 6.2 SC V8 RWD, 797bhp, 8 Speed Auto. AED 359,000 or AED 5,624 / Month with a 20% Down payment for 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 47,194 KM's - Dodge Warranty Valid Until 28th April 2028 or 100,000 KM's - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Granite Grey Metallic - Remote Start - Sunroof - Performance Gauges - Alpine Sound System - Launch Control - Reverse Camera - Bluetooth - Satellite Navigation - Apple Carplay - Blindspot Assist - Cruise Control
